MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-05-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER DAVID EPHRON'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: DIANA CHEN, CSR #11312

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER DAVID EPHRON'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR #11312 =301/PJB
